steps.name: Given the user is on the login page
When the user is logged in with valid username "jpetuser123" and valid password "Test@1234"
When User enter "cats" bird in searchbar
And Presses the Enter key on the keyboard
Then User Should able to see data related to it with expected text "Manx"
